basic_details.job_title: District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 18 Junior Clerk cum Copyist, Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Stenographer Grade-III & Salaried Amin
basic_details.short_information: District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website angul.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 18 vacancies have been announced for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Stenographer Grade-III & Salaried Amin posts through the District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/SEBC/Women candidates; as per rules for PWD and Ex-serviceman.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute, Matriculation
qualification.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Must have passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute. Stenographer Grade-III: Must have passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University, Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute, minimum speed of 80 words per minute in shorthand and 40 words per minute in typewriting. Salaried Amin: Must have passed matriculation or equivalent from a recognized Board, Revenue Inspector Training and knowledge in Computer Operation.

salary_details.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 63,200/- (Level 4) Per Month Stenographer Grade-III: Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- (Level 7) Per Month Salaried Amin: Rs. 21,700/- to Rs. 69,100/- (Level 5) Per Month

selection_process: Written competitive examination Computer Science Test (Practical) Shorthand and Typewriting Test (for Stenographer Grade-III) Viva-voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District & Sessions Judge Angul Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://angul.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
